mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO customer_info ( unit_code, unit_name, disabled_flag, unit_alias, contact_person, contact_phone, region, address, mobile_phone, remarks, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by ) VALUES
( #{item.unitCode}, #{item.unitName}, #{item.disabledFlag}, #{item.unitAlias}, #{item.contactPerson}, #{item.contactPhone}, #{item.region}, #{item.address}, #{item.mobilePhone}, #{item.remarks}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.createdBy}, #{item.updatedAt}, #{item.updatedBy} )
mapper.select:
SELECT unit_name FROM customer_info WHERE unit_name IN
#{name}

SELECT unit_code FROM customer_info WHERE unit_code IN
#{code}

select * from customer_info where 1=1
and unit_name like concat('%',#{customer.unitName},'%')
and contact_person like concat('%',#{customer.contactPerson},'%')
and contact_phone like concat('%',#{customer.contactPhone},'%')
and created_at between #{customer.startCreatedAt} and #{customer.endCreatedAt}
order by created_at desc
select unit_name as label, id as value from customer_info where unit_name like concat('%',#{name},'%')

select * from customer_info where unit_name like concat('%',#{customerName},'%') or unit_alias like concat('%',#{customerName},'%') or contact_person like concat('%',#{customerName},'%') order by case when unit_name like concat('%',#{customerName},'%') then 0 when unit_alias like concat('%',#{customerName},'%') then 1 when contact_person like concat('%',#{customerName},'%') then 2 end, created_at desc limit 1
select id from customer_info where unit_name = #{name} OR unit_alias = #{name} order by case when unit_name = #{name} then 0 else 1 end, created_at desc limit 1

SELECT * FROM customer_info WHERE unit_name IN
#{name}
